episodes.title: John Oliver Reacts to Ex-Prince Andrew's Arrest, Explains How the New York Mets Are Actually British
episodes.description:
John Oliver talks about ex-Prince Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor and Peter Mandelson getting arrested and why he chose to be a Mets fan instead of a Yankees fan.

Late Night with Seth Meyers. Stream now on Peacock: https://bit.ly/3erP2gX
